stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
You are flying from Perth (31°57′S 115°51′E) to Hanoi (21°2′N 105°51′E). What significant weather conditions are expected along this route?

options.a: Potential moderate to severe turbulence, embedded CB clouds, with volcanic ash present 1 200 NM East of the route.
options.b: Only isolated light turbulence, with no thunderstorms.
